niche: used bikes and scooters resale valuation
content_type: scan this, what is it worth?

source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a five-slide short-form package that helps viewers inspect a used bike or scooter listing before paying.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Use model, condition, included accessories, three local comparable listings, repair risk, pickup hassle, and resale confidence.

source_inputs.label: Creative Center intake boundary
source_inputs.value: Only use manually saved observations from TikTok Creative Center. Do not scrape or bypass platform gates.

trend_examples.hook: Scan this bike before you pay the asking price
trend_examples.notes: Item-first hook with visible price and a fast buy/pass payoff.

trend_examples.hook: This cheap scooter could hide a battery bill
trend_examples.notes: Repair-risk reveal creates a reason to swipe.

trend_examples.hook: I checked three local listings before I answered
trend_examples.notes: Comparable-listing proof makes the final value range feel grounded.

notes: Local rendering is allowed by default.
Browser UI research is manual only and requires ALLOW_BROWSER_UI=true.
No paid generation, scraping, account automation, or auto-posting.

slides.on_screen_text: Scan this bike or scooter before you pay
slides.visual_direction: Phone-camera listing screenshot or item photo with the asking price visible.

slides.on_screen_text: Find the exact model and age first
slides.visual_direction: Crop the brand mark, serial clue, battery label, tire size, or model badge.

slides.on_screen_text: Compare it to three local listings
slides.visual_direction: Show three comparable price cards with condition notes.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract repairs before calling it a deal
slides.visual_direction: Highlight battery health, brake work, tires, missing charger, rust, or pickup risk.

slides.on_screen_text: Final range: buy, bargain, or pass
slides.visual_direction: Show the value range, confidence level, and a comment prompt.

output_requirements.caption: Would you pay the asking price for this bike or scooter? Comment "scan" and drop the next listing to check. This is a resale estimate, not a guarantee.
output_requirements.spoken_script: Before you pay for a used bike or scooter, scan the listing like a reseller. Start with the exact model and age, compare it to three local listings, subtract repairs and pickup risk, then call the final number a range: buy, bargain, or pass.
posting_notes: Replace placeholders with real item photos or listing screenshots before publishing.
Verify comparable prices manually in the target city on the posting day.
Do not imply guaranteed appraisal, safety inspection, or platform endorsement.
Post manually only after human approval.

notes: Incoming sample job. Render locally for review before approval.

qa_notes: Trend examples are manual notes, not scraped data.
The local renderer may create placeholder slides for operator review.
Generated assets must be human-approved before any posted ledger move.
